subpoints: The overlay permission is no longer required for Summaries. Summaries playing in audio-only mode will appear as media sessions in your notification shade.

text: Emoji Removal Exception has been fixed.
subpoints: Exception words to negate emoji removal for certain notifications now work as intended.

text: Quick Settings Tile displaying the wrong icon initially has been fixed.
subpoints: The icon used to display as SpeakThat's wordmark with bugdroid but became the correct icon after being pressed. This error has been corrected.
It's small and simple, but gets the job done!

text: Auto Language is now included in configuration backups.
subpoints: This switch was not included for some reason. That's been fixed now.
